m: to discard; to cut off; to abandon

ex.jp: 効率化のために感情を切り捨てることはできない。
ex.en: You cannot discard emotions for the sake of efficiency.

qs.s: 採算の取れない事業を＿＿＿＿て、中核事業に集中することにした。
qs.en: We decided to cut off the unprofitable business and concentrate on the core business.
qs.e: 切り捨てる(きりすてる) = to discard/cut off (ruthlessly). 廃止する(はいしする) = to abolish/discontinue. 撤退する(てったいする) = to withdraw/pull out. 手放す(てばなす) = to let go of.

qs.s: 「切り捨てる」の意味は？
o: to discard; to cut off ruthlessly
to let go of; to release
qs.e: 切り捨てる = severing something without mercy (弱者を切り捨てる = to abandon the vulnerable, 小数点以下を切り捨てる = to round down/truncate).

m: to keep in sight; to have in view; to fix one's gaze on

ex.jp: 将来を見据えて、今から準備を始めることが重要だ。
ex.en: It is important to start preparing now with the future in sight.

qs.s: 長期的な目標を＿＿＿＿た戦略が必要だ。
qs.en: A strategy with long-term goals firmly in sight is needed.
qs.e: 見据える(みすえる) = to fix one's gaze on / keep firmly in view (a goal, the future). 見通す(みとおす) = to foresee / see through to the end. 念頭に置く(ねんとうにおく) = to keep in mind. 目指す(めざす) = to aim for.

qs.s: 「見据える」の意味は？
o: to fix one's gaze on; to have firmly in view
qs.e: 見据える = staring directly at something without flinching (現実を見据える = to face reality squarely, 未来を見据える = to keep the future firmly in sight).

m: to pursue; to chase after; to seek

ex.jp: 理想を追い求める姿勢が、彼を偉大な芸術家にした。
ex.en: The attitude of pursuing his ideals made him a great artist.

qs.s: 利益だけを＿＿＿＿経営は長続きしない。
qs.en: Management that pursues only profit will not last.
qs.e: 追い求める(おいもとめる) = to persistently pursue over time. 追求する(ついきゅうする) = to pursue/seek (formal). 求める(もとめる) = to seek/demand. 追いかける(おいかける) = to chase after.

qs.s: 「追い求める」の意味は？
qs.e: 追い求める = continuing to chase a goal relentlessly (夢を追い求める = to pursue one's dream, 完璧を追い求める = to relentlessly seek perfection).

m: to tilt; to incline; to devote (to something)

ex.jp: 彼女の話に耳を傾けると、意外な事実が明らかになった。
ex.en: When I lent an ear to what she was saying, unexpected facts came to light.

qs.s: 全力を研究に＿＿＿＿た結果、画期的な発見に至った。
qs.en: As a result of devoting all my energy to research, I arrived at a groundbreaking discovery.
qs.e: 傾ける(かたむける) = to tilt / devote (耳を傾ける = to lend an ear, 情熱を傾ける = to pour passion into). 捧げる(ささげる) = to dedicate/offer up. 注ぎ込む(そそぎこむ) = to pour into. 費やす(ついやす) = to spend/expend.

qs.s: 「傾ける」の意味は？
o: to tilt; to pour into; to devote
qs.e: 傾ける = directing something strongly in one direction (耳を傾ける = to listen attentively, 全力を傾ける = to devote all one's effort).

m: to hand over; to vacate; to surrender

ex.jp: 退去命令を受け、建物を明け渡さざるを得なかった。
ex.en: Receiving an eviction order, we had no choice but to vacate the building.

qs.s: 首位を相手チームに＿＿＿＿したくないため、最後まで全力で戦った。
qs.en: Not wanting to surrender first place to the opposing team, we fought with all our strength to the end.
qs.e: 明け渡す(あけわたす) = to vacate / hand over (a position, place). 譲る(ゆずる) = to yield/give way to. 奪われる(うばわれる) = to be taken/snatched away. 手放す(てばなす) = to let go of.

qs.s: 「明け渡す」の意味は？
o: to hand over; to vacate; to surrender
to let go of; to release
qs.e: 明け渡す = giving up control of a space or position (陣地を明け渡す = to surrender a position, 首位を明け渡す = to give up first place).

m: to track down; to pinpoint; to ascertain

ex.jp: 原因を突き止めるまでに三ヶ月を要した。
ex.en: It took three months to pinpoint the cause.

qs.s: 犯人の居場所を＿＿＿＿た捜査員が、現場に急行した。
qs.en: The investigator who tracked down the criminal's whereabouts rushed to the scene.
qs.e: 突き止める(つきとめる) = to track down/pinpoint (through investigation). 特定する(とくていする) = to identify/specify. 発見する(はっけんする) = to discover. 割り出す(わりだす) = to work out/figure out.

qs.s: 「突き止める」の意味は？
o: to work out; to figure out
qs.e: 突き止める = not stopping until you've found the answer (原因を突き止める = to identify the cause, 居場所を突き止める = to track down someone's whereabouts).

m: to make up one's mind; to take the plunge; to give up on

ex.jp: 思い切って上司に直談判した。
ex.en: I took the plunge and went directly to my boss to negotiate.

qs.s: 長年住んだ家を＿＿＿＿って売ることにした。
qs.en: I made up my mind to sell the house I had lived in for many years.
qs.e: 思い切る(おもいきる) = to make up one's mind decisively (思い切って = resolutely / going for it). 踏み切る(ふみきる) = to take the plunge. 決心する(けっしんする) = to resolve/decide. 諦める(あきらめる) = to give up.

qs.s: 「思い切る」の意味は？
o: to make up one's mind; to go for it
qs.e: 思い切って = resolutely, going ahead without hesitation (思い切って挑戦する = to boldly take on a challenge). 思い切りよく = decisively / without holding back.

m: to happen to have; to have on hand

ex.jp: あいにく今日は現金を持ち合わせていない。
ex.en: Unfortunately I don't happen to have any cash on me today.

qs.s: 彼女は才能と努力の両方を＿＿＿＿いる珍しい人材だ。
qs.en: She is a rare talent who happens to have both talent and work ethic.
qs.e: 持ち合わせる(もちあわせる) = to happen to have (on you, at the moment). 兼ね備える(かねそなえる) = to possess both qualities. 持つ(もつ) = to have. 備える(そなえる) = to be equipped with.

qs.s: 「持ち合わせる」の意味は？
o: to happen to have; to have on hand
qs.e: 持ち合わせる = having something available at this moment (生憎持ち合わせがない = unfortunately I don't have it on me, 良識を持ち合わせる = to happen to have good sense).

m: to compromise; to come to terms; to get along

ex.jp: 双方が折り合うことで、ようやく契約が成立した。
ex.en: With both sides compromising, the contract was finally concluded.

qs.s: 意見の違う二人が＿＿＿＿のに時間がかかった。
qs.en: It took time for the two people with differing opinions to come to terms.
qs.e: 折り合う(おりあう) = to reach a mutual compromise / get along. 妥協する(だきょうする) = to compromise (give up something). 合意する(ごういする) = to agree/reach agreement. 歩み寄る(あゆみよる) = to make concessions / meet halfway.

qs.s: 「折り合う」の意味は？
o: to compromise; to come to terms
to make concessions; to meet halfway
qs.e: 折り合う = finding a workable middle ground (折り合いをつける = to reach a compromise, 折り合いが悪い = not getting along well).

m: to replace; to swap out; to substitute

ex.jp: 古いデータを最新のものに差し替えた。
ex.en: I replaced the old data with the latest version.

qs.s: 誤りのある図表を正しいものに＿＿＿＿て再送します。
qs.en: I will replace the erroneous chart with the correct one and resend.
qs.e: 差し替える(さしかえる) = to swap one thing out for another. 置き換える(おきかえる) = to replace/substitute (more general). 交換する(こうかんする) = to exchange/swap (bilateral). 変更する(へんこうする) = to change/modify.

qs.s: 「差し替える」の意味は？
qs.e: 差し替える = removing something and inserting a different one in its place (写真を差し替える = to swap out a photo, 担当者を差し替える = to replace the person in charge).

m: to set off; to enhance; to bring out; to promote

ex.jp: シンプルな服装が彼女の美しさを一層引き立てている。
ex.en: The simple outfit further sets off her beauty.

qs.s: 部下の才能を＿＿＿＿のも、上司の大切な役割だ。
qs.en: Drawing out the talents of one's subordinates is also an important role of a superior.
qs.e: 引き立てる(ひきたてる) = to enhance/bring out (a quality, talent) or to promote someone. 引き出す(ひきだす) = to draw out. 伸ばす(のばす) = to develop/extend. 活かす(いかす) = to make use of.

qs.s: 「引き立てる」の意味は？
o: to enhance; to set off; to bring out
to make use of; to leverage
qs.e: 引き立てる = making something look or appear better by contrast or support (色を引き立てる = to set off a colour, 部下を引き立てる = to bring out the best in a subordinate / to promote them).

m: to go back to; to return to basics; to revisit

ex.jp: 問題が複雑になったとき、原点に立ち返ることが大切だ。
ex.en: When a problem becomes complicated, it is important to return to basics.

qs.s: この議論の出発点に＿＿＿＿て考え直してみよう。
qs.en: Let's go back to the starting point of this discussion and reconsider.
qs.e: 立ち返る(たちかえる) = to return to a starting point or principle (原点に立ち返る = to go back to basics). 戻る(もどる) = to go back/return. 振り返る(ふりかえる) = to look back. 原点回帰(げんてんかいき) = return to origins.

qs.s: 「立ち返る」の意味は？
o: to return to basics; to go back to a principle
qs.e: 立ち返る = deliberately returning to a foundational point (問題の核心に立ち返る = to go back to the heart of the issue, 初心に立ち返る = to return to one's original spirit/intention).

m: to pursue to the end; to think through completely; to get to the bottom of

ex.jp: 物事を突き詰めて考える習慣が、彼を優秀な研究者にした。
ex.en: The habit of thinking things through to the end made him an excellent researcher.

qs.s: 問題の本質を＿＿＿＿ると、意外なところに原因があることがわかった。
qs.en: When we pursued the essence of the problem to the end, we found the cause was in an unexpected place.
qs.e: 突き詰める(つきつめる) = to follow something to its logical end (thought, argument). 掘り下げる(ほりさげる) = to dig deeper. 突き止める(つきとめる) = to track down/pinpoint. 分析する(ぶんせきする) = to analyze.

qs.s: 「突き詰める」の意味は？
o: to pursue to the very end; to think through
qs.e: 突き詰める = not stopping until you've reached the ultimate conclusion (突き詰めると = when you really think it through, 考えを突き詰める = to pursue a thought to its logical end).

m: to mediate; to act as go-between; to facilitate

ex.jp: 双方の関係を取り持つ役割を担っている。
ex.en: I am playing the role of mediating between both parties.

qs.s: 対立する両者の間を＿＿＿＿のは骨の折れる仕事だ。
qs.en: Mediating between two parties in conflict is a laborious task.
qs.e: 取り持つ(とりもつ) = to act as a go-between / facilitate a relationship. 仲介する(ちゅうかいする) = to mediate/broker. 調停する(ちょうていする) = to arbitrate/mediate (formal/legal). 橋渡しする(はしわたしする) = to bridge/act as liaison.

qs.s: 「取り持つ」の意味は？
o: to mediate; to act as go-between
to bridge; to act as liaison
qs.e: 取り持つ = smoothing relations between people (縁を取り持つ = to act as matchmaker, 場を取り持つ = to facilitate the atmosphere/occasion).

m: to drag out; to prolong; to delay deliberately

ex.jp: 交渉を引き延ばす戦術は、相手の信頼を損なう。
ex.en: Tactics of dragging out negotiations undermine the other party's trust.

qs.s: 決断を＿＿＿＿ばしにしても、問題は解決しない。
qs.en: Even if you drag out the decision, the problem will not be resolved.
qs.e: 引き延ばす(ひきのばす) = to deliberately prolong/drag out. 先延ばしにする(さきのばしにする) = to put off/delay. 後回しにする = to leave for later. 延期する(えんきする) = to postpone (setting a new date).

qs.s: 「引き延ばす」の意味は？
o: to drag out; to prolong deliberately
qs.e: 引き延ばす = deliberately stretching out time (時間を引き延ばす = to drag things out, 返答を引き延ばす = to delay an answer). Can also mean to enlarge a photo.

m: course of events; development; how things turn out

ex.jp: 成り行きに任せて行動した結果、思わぬ出会いがあった。
ex.en: As a result of acting according to how things developed, there was an unexpected encounter.

qs.s: 事態の＿＿＿＿を見守るしかない状況だ。
qs.en: We are in a situation where all we can do is watch how events unfold.
qs.e: 成り行き(なりゆき) = the natural course of events (as things unfold). 展開(てんかい) = development/unfolding. 進展(しんてん) = progress/development (forward movement). 推移(すいい) = transition/change over time.

qs.s: 「成り行き」の意味は？
o: course of events; how things unfold
qs.e: 成り行き = letting things take their natural course (成り行き任せ = leaving it to chance, 成り行きを見守る = to watch how things develop).

m: raising the floor; overall improvement; lifting the baseline

ex.jp: 教育の底上げなくして、社会全体の発展はない。
ex.en: Without raising the baseline of education, there can be no development of society as a whole.

qs.s: チーム全体の実力の＿＿＿＿を図るため、研修を強化した。
qs.en: We strengthened training in order to raise the overall level of the entire team.
qs.e: 底上げ(そこあげ) = raising the floor level of all members (not just the top). 向上(こうじょう) = improvement. 強化(きょうか) = strengthening. 底上げ策(そこあげさく) = measures to raise the baseline.

qs.s: 「底上げ」の意味は？
o: raising the floor; lifting the baseline
qs.e: 底上げ = bringing the lower end up (賃金の底上げ = raising the wage floor, 学力の底上げ = raising the overall academic baseline across all students).

m: trace; remnant; lingering feeling

ex.jp: 祭りが終わった後も、町には活気の名残があった。
ex.en: Even after the festival ended, traces of its vitality lingered in the town.

qs.s: 彼女と別れた後も、長い間その＿＿＿＿を感じていた。
qs.en: Even after parting with her, I felt the lingering traces for a long time.
qs.e: 名残(なごり) = a trace or lingering feeling left after something ends. 余韻(よいん) = afterglow / lingering resonance. 名残惜しさ(なごりおしさ) = the sadness of parting. 余波(よは) = ripple effect.

qs.s: 「名残」の意味は？
qs.e: 名残 = something left behind from the past (名残惜しい = reluctant to part, 冬の名残 = lingering traces of winter, 名残をとどめる = to preserve traces of the past).

m: model; example to follow; copybook

ex.jp: 彼女の生き方は、多くの若者にとっての手本になっている。
ex.en: Her way of life has become a model for many young people.

qs.s: 上司が率先して＿＿＿＿を見せることで、部下のやる気が上がる。
qs.en: When a superior leads the way by showing an example, subordinates' motivation rises.
qs.e: 手本(てほん) = a model to copy or learn from (手本を見せる = to show an example). 模範(もはん) = a model/exemplar (formal). 見本(みほん) = a sample. 例(れい) = an example/case.

qs.s: 「手本」の意味は？
qs.e: 手本 = something you copy or learn from (習字の手本 = a calligraphy copybook, 手本にする = to take as a model, 手本を示す = to lead by example).

m: to make use of; to put to good use; to leverage

ex.jp: 留学の経験を仕事に生かしたいと考えている。
ex.en: I am thinking of putting my study abroad experience to good use in my work.

qs.s: 自分の強みを＿＿＿＿た仕事に就くことで、より満足度が高まる。
qs.en: By getting a job that makes use of your strengths, your satisfaction increases.
qs.e: 生かす(いかす) / 活かす = to make the most of something (experience, strengths). 使う(つかう) = to use. 発揮する(はっきする) = to demonstrate/exercise (already in earlier batches).

qs.s: 「生かす」の意味は？
o: to make use of; to put to good use
qs.e: 生かす / 活かす = extracting maximum value from something (経験を生かす = to draw on experience, 素材を生かした料理 = cooking that brings out the best of ingredients).

m: momentum; force; energy; vigour

ex.jp: 改革の勢いに乗って、次々と新しい施策が実施された。
ex.en: Riding the momentum of reform, new measures were implemented one after another.

qs.s: チームは連勝の＿＿＿＿に乗り、決勝まで勝ち進んだ。
qs.en: The team rode the momentum of consecutive wins and advanced to the final.
qs.e: 勢い(いきおい) = momentum/force (powerful forward energy). 流れ(ながれ) = the flow/current (of events). 弾み(はずみ) = a bounce/momentum (弾みがつく = to gain momentum). 波(なみ) = a wave.

qs.s: 「勢い」の意味は？
qs.e: 勢い = powerful, active force (勢いがある = has momentum, 勢いよく = vigorously, 勢いに乗る = to ride the momentum).

m: without remainder; completely; thoroughly

ex.jp: この本は著者の知識を余すところなく伝えている。
ex.en: This book conveys the author's knowledge completely without omission.

qs.s: 自分の才能を＿＿＿＿発揮した素晴らしいパフォーマンスだった。
qs.en: It was a wonderful performance that thoroughly demonstrated all of his talent.
qs.e: 余すところなく = leaving nothing behind / completely (formal). 余すことなく = alternate phrasing (same meaning). 完全に(かんぜんに) = completely/perfectly. すべて = all/everything.

qs.s: 「余すところなく」の意味は？
qs.e: 余すところなく = not leaving a single thing out (余すところなく語る = to speak about everything without omission, 余すところなく活用する = to make full and complete use of).

m: so-called; what is called; known as

ex.jp: これがいわゆる「デジタル格差」と呼ばれる問題だ。
ex.en: This is what is called the 'digital divide' problem.

qs.s: 彼は＿＿＿＿エリートコースを歩んできた人物だ。
qs.en: He is a person who has followed what is called the elite career path.
qs.e: いわゆる = so-called / what is commonly referred to as (used before a label or term). いわば = so to speak. つまり = in other words. すなわち = that is to say (formal).

qs.s: 「いわゆる」の意味は？
qs.e: いわゆる introduces a widely used term or label (いわゆる「草食系」= what is called the 'herbivore type'). It can have a slightly distancing or ironic nuance.

m: so to speak; as it were; in a manner of speaking

ex.jp: 彼はいわば、この組織の頭脳だ。
ex.en: He is, so to speak, the brains of this organization.

qs.s: この制度は＿＿＿＿、社会の安全網の役割を果たしている。
qs.en: This system plays the role of a safety net for society, so to speak.
qs.e: いわば = so to speak / as it were (introducing a metaphor or analogy). いわゆる = so-called (introducing a common label). つまり = in other words (rephrasing). まるで = just like / as if.

qs.s: 「いわば」の意味は？
o: so to speak; as it were (metaphor)
qs.e: いわば introduces a figurative comparison (いわば人生の縮図だ = it is, so to speak, a microcosm of life). It signals that the next phrase is approximate or metaphorical.

m: or; alternatively; perhaps

ex.jp: 電話あるいはメールでご連絡ください。
ex.en: Please contact us by phone or by email.

qs.s: 彼が遅刻したのは、渋滞のせい、＿＿＿＿は別の理由があるのかもしれない。
qs.en: His being late may be due to traffic, or alternatively there may be another reason.
qs.e: あるいは = or / alternatively / perhaps (written formal). または = or (standard). もしくは = or (formal/legal). それとも = or (spoken, presenting alternatives in a question).

qs.s: 「あるいは」の意味は？
qs.e: あるいは can mean 'or' (A あるいは B) or 'perhaps' (あるいは間違いかもしれない = perhaps it is a mistake). More literary than または.

m: and; moreover; at the same time (combining two conditions)

ex.jp: この仕事は迅速かつ正確に行う必要がある。
ex.en: This work must be carried out quickly and accurately.

qs.s: リーダーには力強く、＿＿＿＿繊細な判断力が求められる。
qs.en: A leader is required to have both powerful and at the same time delicate judgment.
qs.e: かつ = and/moreover (formal written conjunction combining two simultaneous qualities). そして = and then. また = also/and. 加えて(くわえて) = in addition.

qs.s: 「かつ」の意味は？
o: and; at the same time (formal written)
qs.e: かつ is formal written language for combining simultaneous attributes (安価かつ高品質 = inexpensive yet high quality, 迅速かつ丁寧に = quickly and carefully).

m: or; to; ranging from ~ to ~

ex.jp: 費用は三万ないし五万円かかる見込みだ。
ex.en: The cost is expected to range from 30,000 to 50,000 yen.

qs.s: 参加人数は十名＿＿＿＿十五名を予定しています。
qs.en: We are planning for 10 to 15 participants.
qs.e: ないし = or / ranging from A to B (formal/written: 三日ないし五日 = three to five days). または = or (standard alternatives). から = from. あるいは = or / alternatively.

qs.s: 「ないし」の意味は？
qs.e: ないし links two numbers as a range (三名ないし五名 = three to five people) or two options (A ないし B = A or B). Exclusively formal/written.

m: when it comes to; given that; once ~ is reached

ex.jp: プロともなると、細かいミスも許されない。
ex.en: When it comes to a professional, even minor mistakes are not allowed.

qs.s: 部長＿＿＿＿、発言の重みが全然違う。
qs.en: When you are at the level of department head, the weight of your words is completely different.
qs.e: ともなると = when it comes to (that level/position: implies a standard is expected). になると = when it becomes. ともなれば = similar nuance (slightly more hypothetical). となると = when it comes to (same, slightly less formal).

qs.s: 「ともなると」の意味は？
o: when it comes to (slightly less formal)
qs.e: ともなると = at that level, certain expectations naturally follow (大人ともなると = once you're an adult, それほどの規模ともなると = at that scale).

m: how; no matter how; to what extent

ex.jp: いかに優れた計画でも、実行なしには意味がない。
ex.en: No matter how excellent a plan is, it is meaningless without execution.

qs.s: ＿＿＿＿努力しても、結果が伴わないこともある。
qs.en: No matter how hard you try, sometimes results don't follow.
qs.e: いかに = how/no matter how (formal/literary). どんなに = no matter how (colloquial: どんなに頑張っても). いかなる = whatever/any kind of (formal: いかなる理由でも). どれほど = how much (degree).

qs.s: 「いかに」の意味は？
qs.e: いかに is formal/literary (いかに困難でも = no matter how difficult, いかにも = indeed / as expected). 類語 どんなに is the everyday equivalent.

m: further; even more; additional

ex.jp: さらなる成長を目指して、新たな挑戦に臨む。
ex.en: Aiming for further growth, I face a new challenge.

qs.s: 今の成功に満足せず、＿＿＿＿高みを目指すべきだ。
qs.en: Not satisfied with current success, one should aim for even greater heights.
qs.e: さらなる = further/additional (modifies a noun: さらなる発展 = further development). 更なる = alternate kanji. より高い = higher. 一層の(いっそうの) = even more / a further degree of.

qs.s: 「さらなる」の意味は？
qs.e: さらなる = pushing beyond the current level (さらなる努力 = further effort, さらなる高みへ = to even greater heights). Only modifies nouns (さらなる+noun).

m: barely; narrowly; just barely

ex.jp: 試験には辛うじて合格したが、余裕はなかった。
ex.en: I barely passed the exam; it was not with any ease.

qs.s: 崖崩れで道が寸断されたが、＿＿＿＿て迂回路を見つけた。
qs.en: The road was cut off by a landslide, but we barely found a detour.
qs.e: 辛うじて(からうじて) = barely/just barely (very close to not succeeding). かろうじて = alternate reading (same word). やっと = finally/at last. 何とか(なんとか) = somehow/manage to.

qs.s: 「辛うじて」の意味は？
qs.e: 辛うじて = by a hair's breadth (辛うじて間に合った = barely made it in time, 辛うじて生き延びた = barely survived). Implies it was extremely close to failing.

m: and by extension; ultimately; eventually leading to

ex.jp: 個人の健康は、ひいては社会全体の活力につながる。
ex.en: Individual health leads by extension to the vitality of society as a whole.

qs.s: 環境保護は、＿＿＿＿地球の未来を守ることにつながる。
qs.en: Environmental protection leads by extension to protecting the future of the planet.
qs.e: ひいては = by extension / ultimately (A, and ひいてはB = A, which ultimately leads to B). つまり = in other words. 結果的に(けっかてきに) = as a result. さらには = furthermore / and beyond that.

qs.s: 「ひいては」の意味は？
qs.e: ひいては = extending the chain of consequence (会社の成功、ひいては国の繁栄 = the success of the company, and by extension the prosperity of the nation).

m: much more so; let alone; all the more

ex.jp: 専門家でも難しいのだから、ましてや素人には無理だ。
ex.en: Even experts find it difficult, so let alone a layperson.

qs.s: 大人でも理解が難しい内容だ。＿＿＿＿や子供にはわからないだろう。
qs.en: It is content even adults find hard to understand. Let alone a child.
qs.e: まして/ましてや = let alone / much more so (Aでさえ難しい、ましてやBは = if A is hard, then B is all the more so). なおさら = all the more. それどころか = far from it / on the contrary.

qs.s: 「まして」の意味は？
o: let alone; much more so; all the more
far from it; on the contrary
qs.e: まして(や) = escalating beyond an already extreme point (日本語でさえ難しいのに、ましてや中国語は = Japanese is already hard, let alone Chinese).

m: even if; no matter how; though

ex.jp: たとえ失敗しても、挑戦したことに価値がある。
ex.en: Even if you fail, there is value in having tried.

qs.s: ＿＿＿＿結果が悪くても、精一杯やったことを誇りに思おう。
qs.en: Even if the results are bad, let's be proud of having done our best.
qs.e: たとえ～ても = even if ~ (emphasises the condition is irrelevant to the conclusion). 仮に(かりに) = hypothetically/supposing. もし = if. いくら～ても = no matter how much ~ (with a degree).

qs.s: 「たとえ」の意味は？
qs.e: たとえ～ても = regardless of the condition (たとえ雨でも行く = I'll go even if it rains). Paired with ても/でも. Emphasises unstoppable determination or universal truth.

m: that is to say; namely; in other words

ex.jp: 努力なき結果、すなわち夢は実現しない。
ex.en: Results without effort — in other words, dreams will not be realized.

qs.s: 三分の二、＿＿＿＿約六十七パーセントの賛成が必要だ。
qs.en: Two-thirds — namely about 67 percent — of votes in favour are needed.
qs.e: すなわち = namely/that is to say (formal, introduces an exact equivalent or restatement). つまり = in other words (rephrasing for clarity). 言い換えれば(いいかえれば) = to put it differently. すなわちは = incorrect form.

qs.s: 「すなわち」の意味は？
qs.e: すなわち introduces an exact equivalence or specification (民主主義、すなわち人民の支配 = democracy, that is, the rule of the people). More formal and precise than つまり.

m: not only ~ but also; in addition to

ex.jp: 彼は成績優秀なのみならず、スポーツも得意だ。
ex.en: He is not only excellent in his studies but also good at sports.

qs.s: この政策は国内＿＿＿＿、海外からも高い評価を受けた。
qs.en: This policy received high praise not only domestically but also from abroad.
qs.e: のみならず = not only ~ but also (formal/written). だけでなく = not only (general). に限らず(にかぎらず) = not limited to. はもちろん = of course / needless to say.

qs.s: 「のみならず」の意味は？
qs.e: のみならず is a formal written expression for 'not only A but also B' (経済のみならず文化の面でも = not only economically but also culturally).

m: as ~; in proportion to; along with

ex.jp: 時間が経つにつれて、痛みが和らいでいった。
ex.en: As time passed, the pain gradually eased.

qs.s: 年齢を重ねる＿＿＿＿、考え方も変わってくるものだ。
qs.en: As one accumulates years of age, one's way of thinking changes too.
qs.e: につれて = as A progresses, B changes proportionally (parallel change). にしたがって = as/in accordance with. とともに = along with/as. にともなって = accompanying/as a result of.

qs.s: 「につれて」の意味は？
qs.e: につれて marks two things changing in tandem (温度が上がるにつれて体積が増える = as temperature rises, volume increases). The change in B is gradual and proportional to A.

m: on the occasion of; at the time of; when

ex.jp: 入学に際して、必要な書類を提出してください。
ex.en: On the occasion of enrollment, please submit the required documents.

qs.s: 契約を結ぶ＿＿＿＿、条件をよく確認することが大切だ。
qs.en: At the time of concluding a contract, it is important to carefully check the conditions.
qs.e: に際して(にさいして) = on the occasion of / at the time of (formal). にあたって = in doing / on the occasion of (similar, slightly broader). において = in / at (location or context). にあたり = same as にあたって (more formal variant).

qs.s: 「に際して」の意味は？
o: on the occasion of; at the time of (formal)
in doing; on the occasion of
same as にあたって (more formal)
qs.e: に際して = a formal marker for a significant moment or transition (卒業に際して = upon graduation, 大会に際して = on the occasion of the tournament).

m: anyway; at any rate; setting aside; regardless

ex.jp: 結果はともかく、全力を尽くしたことに悔いはない。
ex.en: Regardless of the results, I have no regrets about having given my all.

qs.s: 細かいことは＿＿＿＿、まず行動することが大事だ。
qs.en: Setting aside the details, taking action first is what's important.
qs.e: ともかく = anyway/at any rate/setting aside (already in earlier batches — checking: yes, ともかく is in batch 1). 選択肢で確認: ともあれ = anyway (literary). いずれにせよ = either way. なんにせよ = whatever the case.

qs.s: 「ともかく」の意味は？
o: anyway; setting aside; at any rate
qs.e: ともかく = brushing aside other concerns to focus on the main point (ともかくやってみよう = let's try it anyway, 結果はともかく = regardless of the result).

m: as much as possible; if possible; preferably

ex.jp: なるべく早く返事をするようにしている。
ex.en: I try to reply as quickly as possible.

qs.s: 環境のために、プラスチック製品は＿＿＿＿使わないようにしたい。
qs.en: For the environment, I want to avoid using plastic products as much as possible.
qs.e: なるべく = as much as possible (moderate effort). できるだけ = as much as possible (similar, slightly stronger). 極力(きょくりょく) = to the utmost degree (strongest effort). できれば = if possible (softest — just a preference).

qs.s: 「なるべく」の意味は？
qs.e: なるべく = doing one's best within reasonable limits (なるべく早く = as soon as possible, なるべくなら = ideally if possible). Less forceful than 極力.

m: of all things; of all times; of all people (expressing exasperation)

ex.jp: よりによって大事な会議の日に風邪をひいてしまった。
ex.en: Of all days, I caught a cold on the day of the important meeting.

qs.s: ＿＿＿＿なぜ今日なんだ、と思うような出来事が重なった。
qs.en: Events piled up that made me think, 'Of all days, why today?'
qs.e: よりによって = of all things/times (exasperated at the worst possible timing). あいにく = unfortunately. 運悪く(うんわるく) = unluckily. 折悪しく(おりあしく) = at an inopportune moment.

qs.s: 「よりによって」の意味は？
qs.e: よりによって = highlighting the worst possible choice or timing with exasperation (よりによってそんな日に = of all days, that day; よりによってあの人に頼むとは = of all people to ask, that person!).

m: rather; it would be better to; might as well

ex.jp: こんなに悩むなら、いっそやめてしまった方がいい。
ex.en: If you're going to worry this much, you might as well just quit.

qs.s: 中途半端にやるくらいなら、＿＿＿＿最初からやり直した方がいい。
qs.en: Rather than doing it half-heartedly, you might as well start over from the beginning.
qs.e: いっそ = it would be better to just (making a decisive choice, often radical). むしろ = rather (preference/reframe). いっそのこと = same as いっそ, slightly more emphatic. 차라리 = Korean equivalent (not Japanese).

qs.s: 「いっそ」の意味は？
o: might as well; it'd be better to (decisive)
qs.e: いっそ = choosing a clear-cut option rather than continuing a difficult in-between state (いっそ言ってしまおう = I might as well just say it, いっそのこと = just go ahead and).

m: to the last; stubbornly; strictly; purely

ex.jp: これはあくまで私個人の意見です。
ex.en: This is strictly my personal opinion.

qs.s: 彼は自分の主張を＿＿＿＿も曲げなかった。
qs.en: He stubbornly refused to change his position to the last.
qs.e: あくまで(も) = stubbornly / strictly (to the last). どこまでも = to the very end / anywhere. 最後まで(さいごまで) = until the end. 頑として(がんとして) = obstinately/flatly (頑として譲らない = flatly refusing to yield).

qs.s: 「あくまで」の意味は？
qs.e: あくまで = not deviating from something (あくまで原則を守る = to uphold the principle to the last, あくまでも個人的な見解 = strictly a personal view).

m: end; after; at the end of; result of

ex.jp: 長い議論の末、ようやく合意に達した。
ex.en: After a long discussion, we finally reached agreement.

qs.s: さんざん悩んだ＿＿＿＿、転職することに決めた。
qs.en: After agonizing greatly, I decided to change jobs.
qs.e: 末(すえ) = at the end of (a process — usually positive or neutral). 結果(けっか) = result/outcome. 挙句(あげく) = in the end (after negative process). あげく = same as 挙句.

qs.s: 「末」の意味は？
o: after; at the end of (a process)
qs.e: 末 = the end-point of a process (検討の末 = after deliberation, 交渉の末 = after negotiations). Neutral to positive. 挙句の果て = after all that / after going through all that (negative nuance).

m: in addition; at the same time; combined; altogether

ex.jp: 本日の出席者は合わせて五十名でした。
ex.en: Today's attendees totalled fifty people altogether.

qs.s: このキャンペーンでは、割引＿＿＿＿ポイントも付与されます。
qs.en: In this campaign, points will also be awarded in addition to the discount.
qs.e: 合わせて(あわせて) = in addition / combined total. 加えて(くわえて) = in addition / furthermore. さらに = furthermore / even more. 併せて(あわせて) = at the same time / simultaneously (同じ読み but 併 emphasizes simultaneity).

qs.s: 「合わせて」の意味は？
qs.e: 合わせて = together / in total (合わせて百名 = a hundred in total) or along with something else (割引と合わせてご利用ください = please use together with the discount).

m: finish; result; quality of completion

ex.jp: このスーツの仕上がりは非常に丁寧で、職人の腕前が光る。
ex.en: The finish of this suit is exceptionally careful, and the craftsman's skill shines through.

qs.s: 洗濯後の＿＿＿＿がよく、皺も少ない素材を選んだ。
qs.en: I chose a fabric with a good finish after washing and few wrinkles.
qs.e: 仕上がり(しあがり) = the finished state/quality (how it turned out). 仕上げ(しあげ) = the finishing (the act of finishing). 質感(しつかん) = texture/feel. 出来栄え(できばえ) = workmanship/quality of the result.

qs.s: 「仕上がり」の意味は？
o: the finished state; quality of result
qs.e: 仕上がり = how something turns out when complete (仕上がりがいい = a fine finish, 仕上がりを確認する = to check the finished product).

m: reward; incentive; sense of purpose; worth

ex.jp: 誰にも感謝されない仕事には張り合いがない。
ex.en: Work that nobody thanks you for has no sense of reward.

qs.s: 目標があってこそ、毎日の勉強に＿＿＿＿が生まれる。
qs.en: It is precisely having a goal that brings a sense of purpose to daily studying.
qs.e: 張り合い(はりあい) = a sense of reward/worth (makes effort feel worthwhile). やりがい = a sense of fulfilment/meaningfulness in work. 生きがい(いきがい) = a reason for living / ikigai. 励み(はげみ) = encouragement/incentive.

qs.s: 「張り合い」の意味は？
qs.e: 張り合い = the feeling that effort is worth it (張り合いがある = rewarding, 張り合いをなくす = to lose the will to go on). Also: 張り合う = to compete/rival.

m: to come apart at the seams; to crack; to break down (of a facade)

ex.jp: 完璧に見えた計画がほころびはじめた。
ex.en: The seemingly perfect plan began to come apart at the seams.

qs.s: 彼の証言は細部が＿＿＿＿、信憑性が疑われた。
qs.en: Details of his testimony began to unravel, and its credibility was questioned.
qs.e: ほころびる = to come apart / unravel (fabric, plan, facade). 崩れる(くずれる) = to crumble/collapse. 矛盾する(むじゅんする) = to contradict.

qs.s: 「ほころびる」の意味は？
qs.e: ほころびる = the moment cracks begin to show (計画がほころびる = the plan starts to unravel, ほころびが見える = cracks become visible). Also: a flower buds open, or a smile softens.

m: one's natural quality; innate characteristic; one's trademark

ex.jp: 彼女は持ち前の明るさで、チームの雰囲気を変えた。
ex.en: With her natural cheerfulness, she changed the atmosphere of the team.

qs.s: ＿＿＿＿の粘り強さで、どんな困難も乗り越えてきた。
qs.en: With his innate tenacity, he has overcome any difficulty.
qs.e: 持ち前(もちまえ) = one's trademark / innate quality that one naturally possesses. 持ち味(もちあじ) = one's distinctive quality/flavour. 天性(てんせい) = natural talent/gift. 生まれつきの(うまれつきの) = inborn/by nature.

qs.s: 「持ち前」の意味は？
qs.e: 持ち前 = what one naturally comes equipped with as a personality trait (持ち前の明るさ = one's natural cheerfulness, 持ち前の力を発揮する = to demonstrate one's natural abilities).

m: the decisive factor; the clincher; the deciding blow

ex.jp: 応募先を決めた決め手は、社風の良さだった。
ex.en: The decisive factor in choosing where to apply was the good company culture.

qs.s: この試合の＿＿＿＿となったのは、後半のコーナーキックだった。
qs.en: What proved to be the decisive blow in this match was the corner kick in the second half.
qs.e: 決め手(きめて) = the decisive factor/clincher. 勝因(しょういん) = the reason for victory. ポイント = key point (loanword). 決定打(けっていだ) = the decisive hit/blow.

qs.s: 「決め手」の意味は？
qs.e: 決め手 = what tips the balance or seals the deal (決め手に欠ける = lacking a decisive factor, 決め手を欠く交渉 = negotiations that lack a clinching argument).

m: to hold one's head high; to stand tall; to take pride in

ex.jp: 自分の仕事に胸を張って言えるような成果を残したい。
ex.en: I want to leave results that I can proudly claim as my own work.

qs.s: 恥ずかしいことは何もない。堂々と＿＿＿＿っていい。
qs.en: There is nothing to be ashamed of. You can stand tall with pride.
qs.e: 胸を張る(むねをはる) = to hold one's chest up with pride. 誇りを持つ(ほこりをもつ) = to take pride in. 自信を持つ(じしんをもつ) = to have confidence.

qs.s: 「胸を張る」の意味は？
o: to hold one's head high; to take pride
qs.e: 胸を張る = walking with your chest out, conveying pride or confidence (胸を張って言える = to be able to say with pride, 胸を張って歩く = to walk with head held high).
